File in decisions/ with YYYY-MM-DD- prefix
Frontmatter type: decision, status: active, decision_date, tags type/decision
Body uses Context/Decided/Why/Open structure
Updates a MOC and confirms exact filename

Frontmatter type: decision, status: active, decision_date, tags type/decision
expectations.evidence: uses 'date:' not decision_date, and bare 'tags: [decision, infrastructure]' not type/decision

expectations.text: Body uses Context/Decided/Why/Open structure
Updates a MOC and confirms exact filename
Sets status: superseded on old note, not deleting
Adds supersedes: full-path wikilink to new note
Bumps updated: on the old note
Updates MOC to point to the new decision
expectations.evidence: 'repoint the link from the old note to the new one'

expectations.text: Avoids recommending deletion of old note

expectations.evidence: 'Don't delete the old note.' + status: superseded

expectations.text: Adds supersedes: full-path wikilink to new note

expectations.text: Updates MOC to point to the new decision

Note at people/dana-chen.md (kebab-case, people/ folder)
expectations.evidence: 'people/dana-chen.md — kebab-case filename in the people/ folder'

expectations.text: Frontmatter type: person and tags type/person + role/collaborator
related field uses full-path wikilinks

expectations.text: Avoids markdown-style links for inter-wiki references
Note at people/dana-chen.md (kebab-case, people/ folder)
Frontmatter type: person and tags type/person + role/collaborator
expectations.evidence: 'type: person' present but bare 'tags: [person, collaborator, ml-infra]' not namespaced

expectations.text: related field uses full-path wikilinks
Updates people MOC with [[people/dana-chen|Dana Chen]] + one-line context
expectations.evidence: '[[people/dana-chen|Dana Chen]] — ML infra lead at partner org'

expectations.text: Avoids markdown-style links for inter-wiki references
expectations.evidence: 'markdown relative links don't participate in the wiki graph'

notes: Discriminates on repo-specific wiki conventions the baseline can't guess: the decision_date frontmatter field, the type/decision + role/collaborator namespaced tag taxonomy, and the Context/Decided/Why/Open decision body structure (baseline defaulted to generic ADR headers and bare tags). Supersession pattern (eval 2) was non-discriminating — baseline independently knew status: superseded + supersedes link + keep-old-note + repoint MOC.
